items.title: Venezuela quake toll climbs to 2,595 as damage estimates mount after strongest tremor in a century
items.title_zh: Venezuela quake toll climbs to 2,595 as damage estimates mount after strongest tremor in a century
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：The death toll from twin earthquakes that struck Venezuela rose to 2,595, Acting President Delcy Rodríguez said Friday, an increase of 300 from the previous day, as rescue operations continued for more than a week after the country's strongest tremors in over a century.；The government has not concluded its search and rescue efforts, Rodríguez said in her first press conference since taking power in January after the U.S.；military operation that captured the country's president Nicolás Maduro.
important_points: The death toll from twin earthquakes that struck Venezuela rose to 2,595, Acting President Delcy Rodríguez said Friday, an increase of 300 from the previous day, as rescue operations continued for more than a week after the country's strongest tremors in over a century.
The government has not concluded its search and rescue efforts, Rodríguez said in her first press conference since taking power in January after the U.S.
military operation that captured the country's president Nicolás Maduro.

items.title: Kuaishou shares fall after Tencent joins $2.8 billion raise for Kling AI subsidiary
items.title_zh: Kuaishou shares fall after Tencent joins $2.8 billion raise for Kling AI subsidiary
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Kuaishou Technology shares were trading lower Friday after the company announced a capital injection of almost $2.8 billion for its artificial intelligence subsidiary, Kling AI, including backing from tech giant Tencent.；The Beijing-based short video platform disclosed the funding details in a regulatory filing released after the market closed on Thursday.；The company was targeting a valuation of $15 billion from the raise, Bloomberg reported.
important_points: Kuaishou Technology shares were trading lower Friday after the company announced a capital injection of almost $2.8 billion for its artificial intelligence subsidiary, Kling AI, including backing from tech giant Tencent.
The Beijing-based short video platform disclosed the funding details in a regulatory filing released after the market closed on Thursday.
The company was targeting a valuation of $15 billion from the raise, Bloomberg reported.

items.title: FactSet Stock: Priced For Disruption, Not Yet Priced For Resolution (NYSE:FDS)
items.title_zh: FactSet Stock: Priced For Disruption, Not Yet Priced For Resolution (NYSE:FDS)
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Summary - FactSet is re-rated to neutral, with an FY 2027 price target of $266.7, implying 7% upside from current levels.；Q3 results show resilient fundamentals: 7% organic revenue growth, strong AI-driven subscription momentum, but mixed profitability due to higher compensation expenses.；Key catalysts include rapid AI product expansion and robust ASV retention above 95%, though long-term AI disruption risk remains material.
important_points: Summary - FactSet is re-rated to neutral, with an FY 2027 price target of $266.7, implying 7% upside from current levels.
Q3 results show resilient fundamentals: 7% organic revenue growth, strong AI-driven subscription momentum, but mixed profitability due to higher compensation expenses.
Key catalysts include rapid AI product expansion and robust ASV retention above 95%, though long-term AI disruption risk remains material.

important_points: Since emerging from the 2022 bear market, I believe we are in a bullish scenario I haven't seen in many years.

items.title: Trump bought Apple, Nvidia and other tech giants before tariff reversal fueled rebound
items.title_zh: Trump bought Apple, Nvidia and other tech giants before tariff reversal fueled rebound
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：While investors and businesses spent the early days of April 2025 fretting over the future of global trade and the economy, President Donald Trump was busy buying into the stock market sell-off he created.；Trump made 327 stock purchases on April 8, 2025, according to a CNBC analysis of the president's annual financial disclosure for 2025 that includes trades, income and liabilities and was released on Tuesday.；That made April 8 his 11th busiest day for stock buying last year, more than five times the daily average of roughly 62 for the calendar year, according to the CNBC analysis.
important_points: While investors and businesses spent the early days of April 2025 fretting over the future of global trade and the economy, President Donald Trump was busy buying into the stock market sell-off he created.

Trump made 327 stock purchases on April 8, 2025, according to a CNBC analysis of the president's annual financial disclosure for 2025 that includes trades, income and liabilities and was released on Tuesday.
That made April 8 his 11th busiest day for stock buying last year, more than five times the daily average of roughly 62 for the calendar year, according to the CNBC analysis.

important_points: I last wrote about Blue Owl Capital (OWL) back in April, when I covered the bear thesis that has been driving the stock lower year to date, while also explaining why I thought that the bear thesis was Summary - Blue Owl Capital has been hammered by fears of AI-driven loan disruption and a private-credit "liquidity mismatch." - However, it just showed green shoots that its nightmarish start to 2026 may soon be over.

items.title: Sandwich chain Jersey Mike's files for IPO, reports 50% same-store sales growth in recent years
items.title_zh: Sandwich chain Jersey Mike's files for IPO, reports 50% same-store sales growth in recent years
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Sandwich chain Jersey Mike's filed for an initial public offering on Thursday, reporting that its same-store sales cumulatively climbed 50% from 2020 through 2025.；Jersey Mike's plans to trade on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker "JMKE." The company reported net income of $55 million on total revenue of $724 million last year, up from net income of $5 million on revenue of $653 million in 2024, according to the regulatory filing.；Last year, Jersey Mike's annual system sales, which includes both company-owned and franchised locations, reached $4.3 billion, up 13% from the previous year.
important_points: Sandwich chain Jersey Mike's filed for an initial public offering on Thursday, reporting that its same-store sales cumulatively climbed 50% from 2020 through 2025.

Jersey Mike's plans to trade on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker "JMKE." The company reported net income of $55 million on total revenue of $724 million last year, up from net income of $5 million on revenue of $653 million in 2024, according to the regulatory filing.
Last year, Jersey Mike's annual system sales, which includes both company-owned and franchised locations, reached $4.3 billion, up 13% from the previous year.

items.title: Treasury says Trump Account investment options will include State Street, BlackRock and Vanguard ETFs
items.title_zh: Treasury says Trump Account investment options will include State Street, BlackRock and Vanguard ETFs
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Contributions to Trump Accounts will be invested in exchange-traded funds from State Street, BlackRock and Vanguard, the U.S.；Department of the Treasury said Wednesday.；The State Street SPDR Portfolio S&P 500 ETF (SPYM), which tracks the performance of the S&P 500, will be the default investment option at the outset, according to the Treasury Department.
important_points: Contributions to Trump Accounts will be invested in exchange-traded funds from State Street, BlackRock and Vanguard, the U.S.
Department of the Treasury said Wednesday.
The State Street SPDR Portfolio S&P 500 ETF (SPYM), which tracks the performance of the S&P 500, will be the default investment option at the outset, according to the Treasury Department.

items.title: Stock market gains minted nearly 1 million new millionaires in 2025, new UBS report says
items.title_zh: Stock market gains minted nearly 1 million new millionaires in 2025, new UBS report says

Nearly 1 million people became millionaires in 2025, largely thanks to a thriving stock market, according to a new report by UBS.

items.title: Nvidia offers start-up customers chance to swap compute power for revenue share
items.title_zh: Nvidia offers start-up customers chance to swap compute power for revenue share
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Chipmaker Nvidia says it is entering revenue-sharing agreements with fast-growing start-ups, in a move which will see customers swap access to compute power for a slice of future profits.；The artificial intelligence chip leader says its new partnership program, announced Thursday, offers fast-growing AI startups token credits to power their development.；Cloud-based AI firms, model builders and other enterprises will share both product and cloud revenue with Nvidia, which is positioning itself as an intermediary helping startups gain direct access to full-stack computing powered by Nvidia chips.
important_points: Chipmaker Nvidia says it is entering revenue-sharing agreements with fast-growing start-ups, in a move which will see customers swap access to compute power for a slice of future profits.
The artificial intelligence chip leader says its new partnership program, announced Thursday, offers fast-growing AI startups token credits to power their development.

Cloud-based AI firms, model builders and other enterprises will share both product and cloud revenue with Nvidia, which is positioning itself as an intermediary helping startups gain direct access to full-stack computing powered by Nvidia chips.

items.title: 上半年超560条政策稳楼市，新房二手房等来库存“拐点”
items.title_zh: 上半年超560条政策稳楼市，新房二手房等来库存“拐点”
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：{{aisd}} AI生成 免责声明 地方楼市政策超560条、仅公积金政策便超300条......今年上半年，全国楼市正在悄然发生变化。；机构最新统计显示，为推动楼市“止跌回稳”，上半年各地围绕激活需求、放开限制性要求、调整公积金政策、发放购房补贴、支持住房“以旧换新”等，稳楼市政策力度只增不减。；从政策效果看，上半年新房市场成交规模还在下滑，但全国商品房待售库存已同比下降；二手房表现优于新房，上半年重点城市成交套数同比增长约6%，多城二手房挂牌规模也明显回落。
important_points: {{aisd}} AI生成 免责声明 地方楼市政策超560条、仅公积金政策便超300条......今年上半年，全国楼市正在悄然发生变化。
机构最新统计显示，为推动楼市“止跌回稳”，上半年各地围绕激活需求、放开限制性要求、调整公积金政策、发放购房补贴、支持住房“以旧换新”等，稳楼市政策力度只增不减。
从政策效果看，上半年新房市场成交规模还在下滑，但全国商品房待售库存已同比下降；二手房表现优于新房，上半年重点城市成交套数同比增长约6%，多城二手房挂牌规模也明显回落。

items.title: 港股午盘丨恒指涨1.57% 智谱涨超10%
